#8,JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - RPT,J.LEWIS - CLERK,G.DECKER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/STEVE LITTMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. PURS. TO JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 310 COLUMBUS,#203, S.F, CA. - FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED- IATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12-2-96,5PM - ALL RENT & DAM- AGES WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR ATTY FEES & COSTS - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED. PL. ATTY.TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENTICOFF, CHARLES SUED AS CHUCK PENTICOFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVE, RM#203, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL DEC-02-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY F EES. SECUIRTY DEPOSIT FORF. TO PL.
